title: ManhuntKoth
description: A plugin that let you play manhunt, however if the Speedrunner dies, the Hunter who killed them will become the Speedrunner.
body:
# ManhuntKoth (Manhunt King of the hill)
Original by specnr (Speedrunner King of the hill)
A plugin that let you play manhunt. Similar to that manhunt by dream, however if the Speedrunner dies, the Hunter who killed them will become the Speedrunner.
Command: 
- "/runner <player name>" choose the player as the speedrunner.
- "/random" choose the random player as the speedrunner.
- "/c" to get a compass if you lost it
![select runner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34dd61cec235f482f8573248ee28029266063615.png)
![Compass pointing to runner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c57beae7813103c150d49c63f5112cf42c098c.png)
Some feature:
- Compass point to the runner's last location when they enter another dimension
- Choose the closest hunter to become speedrunner when the runner die
- Remove the compass when hunter becomes speedrunner
- Compass doesn't drop on death
- Anti break blaze spawner (because blaze are essential for speedrunning)
